privileged_info_summary: The task relies on the real-world San Francisco UrbanSim dataset (`sanfran_public.h5`) originally downloaded from the public UDST repository. The dataset contains a `/zoning` table with relevant attributes including `max_far` explicitly queried by the task. The target Jupyter Notebook `/home/ga/urbansim_projects/notebooks/zoning_exploration.ipynb` and dataset `/home/ga/urbansim_projects/data/sanfran_public.h5` perfectly match the setup logic. Additionally, the required output paths `/home/ga/urbansim_projects/output/zoning_summary.csv` and `/home/ga/urbansim_projects/output/zoning_far_histogram.png`, as well as the expected CSV summary structure (`column_name`, `mean`, `std`, `min`, `max`), are fully validated by the instructions and the scoring checks in `verifier.py`.
